Perfect! All tests passed (221 tests passed). Now let me create a summary of the work completed:

## Summary

Successfully fixed all hardcoded Tailwind colors in the FormRenderer and FormBuilder components by replacing them with semantic tokens. All changes maintain the exact same visual appearance while using the project's semantic color system.

### Files Updated

**1. D:\Proton Drive\My files\Documents\Professional\Programming\Web Development\system.knowledgebase\src\components\FormRenderer\FieldComponents.tsx**
- `text-red-500` → `text-accent-red` (required field asterisks - 11 instances)
- `text-red-500` → `text-accent-red` (error messages - 11 instances)
- `text-yellow-500` → `text-accent-yellow` (rating stars)
- `hover:bg-red-500/10` → `hover:bg-accent-red/10` (delete file button)
- `text-red-500` → `text-accent-red` (X icon for file removal)

**2. D:\Proton Drive\My files\Documents\Professional\Programming\Web Development\system.knowledgebase\src\components\FormRenderer\FormRenderer.tsx**
- `text-green-500` → `text-accent-green` (progress complete message)
- `text-red-500` → `text-accent-red` (required field asterisk in calculated fields)

**3. D:\Proton Drive\My files\Documents\Professional\Programming\Web Development\system.knowledgebase\src\components\FormRenderer\QuizResults.tsx**
- `text-green-500` / `text-red-500` → `text-accent-green` / `text-accent-red` (score percentage)
- `bg-green-500/10 text-green-500` → `bg-accent-green/10 text-accent-green` (passed badge)
- `bg-red-500/10 text-red-500` → `bg-accent-red/10 text-accent-red` (not passed badge)
- `border-green-500/30 bg-green-500/5` → `border-accent-green/30 bg-accent-green/5` (correct answer backgrounds)
- `border-red-500/30 bg-red-500/5` → `border-accent-red/30 bg-accent-red/5` (incorrect answer backgrounds)
- `text-green-500` / `text-red-500` → `text-accent-green` / `text-accent-red` (CheckCircle/XCircle icons)
- `text-green-500` → `text-accent-green` (correct answer text)

**4. D:\Proton Drive\My files\Documents\Professional\Programming\Web Development\system.knowledgebase\src\components\FormBuilder\FieldList.tsx**
- `bg-red-500/10 text-red-500` → `bg-accent-red/10 text-accent-red` (required badge)
- `hover:bg-red-500/10 text-red-500` → `hover:bg-accent-red/10 text-accent-red` (delete button)

**5. D:\Proton Drive\My files\Documents\Professional\Programming\Web Development\system.knowledgebase\src\components\FormBuilder\FormPreview.tsx**
- `text-red-500` → `text-accent-red` (spam warning message)

### Semantic Token Mappings Used

- **Red colors (errors, danger, delete):** `red-*` → `accent-red`
- **Green colors (success, positive):** `green-*` → `accent-green`
- **Yellow colors (warnings, ratings):** `yellow-*` → `accent-yellow`

### Verification

- ✅ TypeScript type-check passed
- ✅ All 221 tests passed
- ✅ No visual changes - semantic tokens map to same colors
- ✅ All opacity variants preserved (e.g., `/10`, `/5`, `/30`)
- ✅ All hover states preserved

All hardcoded colors have been successfully replaced with semantic tokens following the project's design system conventions.
